provenance.note: Synthetic placeholder so CI can run before a real `just eval-record` against pi. Replace with real recording before treating any score as a measurement.

text:
Perf branch of the diagnose loop: logs are the wrong tool for
a latency regression. First establish a baseline timing
harness for /search (p95 over 200 requests), then bisect the
deploy range with `git bisect run` consuming that signal.
Measure first, fix second.
